description_long: This is a medium-sized, freestanding wooden shelving unit with three open shelves and a flat top. The front-facing shelves display a variety of objects, including three green-bottled containers with white bases, a framed photograph or picture, three stylized skulls, and a sword or rod lying horizontally on the bottom shelf. The sides and back are solid, with no visible openings, handles, or doors, and the overall shape is rectangular with slightly beveled top edges. The wood appears to be a uniform medium brown, giving the unit a sturdy and utilitarian appearance. The shelves are evenly spaced and capable of supporting small to medium-sized items. This type of shelving unit would be suitable for use in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or community spaces for storage and display.
description: A medium brown wooden shelving unit with three open shelves, displaying bottles, skulls, a framed picture, and a sword. The sides and back are solid, and the shelves are evenly spaced for storage or display.
description_view_0: Front view showing three shelves with bottles, a framed picture, three skulls, and a sword; all contents are visible.
description_view_1: Side view showing the solid, flat brown side panel with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, solid brown back with no openings or details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, showing a flat brown panel.
